name: All Exploits Become Offenses - Al Haddad Motors
notes: Reports exploit attacks on events. By default, this rule is disabled. Enable this rule if you want all events categorized as exploits to create an offense.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of ESET Remote Administrator @ APPLICATION
when the event matches ESET AV Action (custom) is any of Blocked
when the event QID is one of the following (6500591) Information - Event CRE
TD_list: APPLY All Exploits Become Offenses - Al Haddad Motors on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of ESET Remote Administrator @ APPLICATION
AND NOT when the event matches ESET AV Action (custom) is any of Blocked
AND NOT when the event QID is one of the following (6500591) Information - Event CRE
